title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL- RAJA MUDA ANNEX IN BARANGAY RAJA MUDA, MUNICIPALITY OF PIKIT, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO FROM THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS RAJA MUDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3481; 109 OG No. 25, 4392 (June 24, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10422, April 08, 2013 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL- RAJA MUDA ANNEX IN BARANGAY RAJA MUDA, MUNICIPALITY OF PIKIT, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO FROM THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS RAJA MUDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School. 芒聙聰

The Pikit National High School 芒聙聯 Raja Muda Annex in Barangay Raja Muda, Municipality of Pikit, Province of North Cotabato is hereby separated from the Pikit National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Raja Muda National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聰 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Pikit National High School -Raja Muda Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Raja Muda National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the operationalization of the Raja Muda National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriation of the Pikit National High School 芒聙聯 Raja Muda Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity. 芒聙聯

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 20, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 0 8 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
